title: Red Satin Ribbon 3mm, 91 Meters Solid Colors Fabric Ribbon for Crafting, Gift Wrapping, Balloons, DIY Sewing Project, Hair Bows and Cake Decoration
features: Premium Ribbon - Each Double faced ribbon is 1/8" (≈ 3mm) in width and 100yards(≈91 Meters) in length. Both sides are smooth surface ribbon made of high-quality Double-sided polyester fabric and one side is full of luster. There are many colors optional, every color is very bright, it's the best choice for DIY project

Ribbons for Gift Wrapping - These beautiful multi-color ribbons are suitable for all kinds of gift boxes, such as wedding gifts, birthday gifts, holiday gifts, souvenirs, anniversary gifts, etc. They are long enough to be tied into bows and decorate the biscuits, cake, candies packages, add a touch of unique color

Applicable Scenarios - These beautiful 3mm Double-sided satin ribbons are suitable for decoration of Easter, Halloween, Christmas, Thanksgiving Party, Birthday Party, Gender Reveal Party, Family Gatherings, Weddings, Show, Exhibition, etc. Add a sense of atmosphere to your parties, celebrations, gatherings, events, etc

Wide Range of Uses - These ribbons for crafts can be used under sewing machines, embroidery machines, knitting machines, so they are not only used for scene layout, bows for gift wrapping, gift box tie, but also DIY into beautiful hair bands, hair accessories, bow hair Rope, balloons decoration, etc. Can be woven into your own unique bridal bracelet, bridesmaid wristband corsage, souvenir strap, brooch, graduation ribbon lei, pet decoration, etc.
Warm Tips - Both ends of the cut Double Faced Satin ribbon need to be sealed to prevent fraying and loosening. Just sweep the ends of the ribbon over the candlelight and you're done
description: Product Description Convey love and warmth with a Christmas gift Gift Wrapping Ribbon DIY Crafting Ribbon Bow Making Bouquets Ribbon
